scripts.install-all: npm install --legacy-peer-deps && npm install --prefix backend --legacy-peer-deps && npm install --prefix frontend --legacy-peer-deps
scripts.postinstall: npm install --prefix backend --legacy-peer-deps && npm install --prefix frontend --legacy-peer-deps
scripts.build: cd frontend && npm install --legacy-peer-deps && npm run build
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
